mapper.select: SELECT user_code, employee_no, name, phone, email, created_at, last_login_at, is_lock, sys_ck FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE '%-delete' ORDER BY employee_no
SELECT user_code, employee_no, name, phone, email, position, created_at, last_login_at, is_lock, sys_ck FROM users WHERE name NOT LIKE '%-delete' AND user_code = #{userCode} ORDER BY employee_no
SELECT NVL(MAX(user_code), 0) + 1 AS next_user_code, NVL(MAX(employee_no), 0) + 1000 AS next_employee_no FROM users
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_code, employee_no, name, position, password_hash, created_at, is_lock) VALUES ( #{userCode}, #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{position}, #{passwordHash}, SYSDATE, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = name || '-delete' ,is_lock = 1 WHERE user_code = #{userCode}

UPDATE users SET sys_ck =
'Y'
'N'
WHERE user_code = #{userCode}
